title: HTMLElement.prototype
description: Useful built-in extensions for the <mark>HTMLElement</mark> prototype.

methods.name: function getBoundingClientRectOffset(): DOMRect
methods.description: Gets a DOMRect object that describes the element’s size and its position relative (including borders) to the document rather than the viewport.

methods.name: function getBoundingClientContentRectOffset(): DOMRect
methods.description: Gets a DOMRect object that describes the element’s size and its content position (excluding borders) relative to the document rather than the viewport.

methods.name: function setOffset(offset: intell.math.PointLike): void
methods.description: Sets the current coordinates of the element relative to the document.
